## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test update

## Validation

- [ ] composer test
- [ ] composer analyse
- [ ] composer lint
- [ ] composer release:check

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Documentation updated (README/CHANGELOG/UPGRADE/docs)
- [ ] No unintended breaking changes
- [ ] Risk and rollback plan described (if needed)

## Notes for Reviewers

Include any areas that need extra attention.
